module.name: prefer-guard-clauses
module.description: Prefer guard clauses by disallowing else blocks when the if branch already terminates control flow.

scenarios.name: should allow an if statement with no else when the if branch returns early
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the if statement

scenarios.name: should allow an if/else where the if branch does not terminate
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the if statement

specifications.feature: Unnecessary else after terminating if branch

scenarios.name: should report an else block when the if branch returns
scenarios.given: if (error) { return null; } else { return result; }
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the if statement
scenarios.then: a preferGuardClauses violation is reported on the else clause

scenarios.name: should report an else block when the if branch throws
scenarios.given: if (!valid) { throw new Error(); } else { processData(); }
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the if statement
scenarios.then: a preferGuardClauses violation is reported on the else clause
